full_text:
Tumor tissue was cut and dissociated using Dispase. For 14.5 mL of DMEM/F12, I used 300 uL Dispase, and 150 uL DNAse. Incubated in the oven for 40 min; RBC lysis buffer 4 mL + 20 mL of medium. After centrifuge, I resuspended cells in 5 mL medium and counted cells.

Dispase dissociated cells:

Cell count/ml 1):

total: 8.13 E6

live: 4.23 E6

viability: 52.1 %

size: 7.2 um

Cell count /ml 2):

total: 6.57 E6

live: 4.43 E6

viability: 67.5 %

size: 7.2 um

Total cell count: 36.75 E6

Total volume: 5 mL

Overall # of cells in 5 mL was 36.75 E6.

I froze 6 cryovials: 4 cryovials contain 4E6 cells each, and 2 cryovials contain 10E6 cells each.

Cells were frozen at -80, on 18.04.2024
